beats.n_fin0: the column crests {LEG5_WAYPOINT} and sees, far below, {LEG6_TERRAIN} beyond the {HAZARD}
beats.n_fin1: the descent to {GOAL} floor is choked with fresh {HAZARD}; {HERO} rations the last water and orders the final push
beats.n_fin2: a lava tongue splits the approach; the party bridges it with charred timber as {DEADLINE} booms behind them
beats.n_fin3: {GOAL} gate is in sight across a final field of settling cinder, the whole expedition still together
beats.n_fin4: {HERO} counts heads at {GOAL} threshold, every soul accounted for, and chooses how to lead them across the last line

beats.n_start: {HERO} musters {PARTY_NAME} at {ENTRANCE} as {DEADLINE} groans; {GOAL} lies six legs away across {THRESHOLD}, and every route out demands a first hard choice
beats.n_win_all: every member of {PARTY_NAME} walks down into {GOAL} as {DEADLINE} finally blows behind the sealed pass; {HERO} has brought them all home to green water and clean air
beats.n_win_costly: the split party wins the crossing but the rear guard loses its stores and limps in last; the expedition survives in {GOAL}, battered and whole, the cost written on every face
beats.n_win_scout: the scouts find the one safe descent and the column follows by lantern; the expedition reaches {GOAL} slowly but intact, {HERO} last across the line
